# Release Checklist

## Document Control
- Project:
- Version:
- Release Owner:
- Status:
- Last Updated:

## 1. Build Readiness
- [ ] Correct version number applied
- [ ] Correct branch / tag identified
- [ ] Build generated from approved configuration
- [ ] Artifacts archived
- [ ] Crash / log capture enabled as needed

## 2. Functional Readiness
- [ ] Startup path validated
- [ ] Core gameplay path validated
- [ ] Save / load validated
- [ ] Settings and input validated
- [ ] Entitlement / account flow validated if applicable
- [ ] Offline / online behavior validated if applicable

## 3. Quality Readiness
- [ ] Blocking bug threshold met
- [ ] Known issues documented
- [ ] Waivers explicitly approved
- [ ] Performance targets met or waived
- [ ] Accessibility checks reviewed

## 4. Content Readiness
- [ ] Final scenes / maps / levels included
- [ ] Final localization content included
- [ ] Final audio / VO content included
- [ ] No test-only or deprecated content shipped unintentionally

## 5. Platform / Store Readiness
- [ ] Store metadata complete
- [ ] Ratings / age classification complete
- [ ] Certification / compliance checklist reviewed
- [ ] Required legal text present
- [ ] Screenshots / trailers / descriptions updated if needed

## 6. Operational Readiness
- [ ] Analytics / telemetry environment verified
- [ ] Live-ops dependencies verified
- [ ] Rollback / hotfix plan ready
- [ ] Support / community notes prepared if needed

## 7. Documentation Readiness
- [ ] Patch notes prepared
- [ ] Release notes prepared
- [ ] Internal go / no-go record updated
- [ ] Known issues log published internally

## 8. Final Approval
- [ ] QA sign-off
- [ ] Technical sign-off
- [ ] Production sign-off
- [ ] Release sign-off

## 9. Post-Release Monitoring Plan
- Owners:
- Metrics to watch:
- Incident path:
